# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-llm-heavy.container, mios-llm-heavy-alt.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-ai-heavy.pod
# Heavy inference lane pod.
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-ai-heavy.pod):
#   mios-llm-heavy
#   mios-llm-heavy-alt
[Unit]
Description='MiOS' AI heavy inference pod
After=network-online.target

[Pod]
PodName=mios-ai-heavy
Network=host

[Install]
